text:
どれだけ硬い食材でも
一刀両断にできる包丁……
料理人なら誰もが欲しがるものよ。

グワナーダ製の大包丁は
すごく気に入ってるんだけど
もう１本くらい欲しいのよね。

黒ノ領域にいる
大きな蜘蛛みたいなエネミーが
持ってる大鎌がいい感じなのよ。

大変だとは思うけど
お願いできないかし

A knife that can cut anything in two with one
stupendous slice, no matter how tough it is...
That would be a chef's dream.

I really like the large Gwanada-made knife I
have in my inventory, but I'd love something
new.

I hear there's a big spider-like enemy in the
Kuro Province that has a giant scythe. That'd
be pretty good.

I'm sure it'll be a pain to get, but could you
nab one for me?
